title: RedlineBench Prediction
description: Metadata envelope a harness submits per task alongside the redlined .docx. The .docx itself is the primary artifact; this makes the submission attributable and reproducible.

harness.description: Agent harness, e.g. claude-code / codex / opencode / custom.

run_id.description: Unique id for this rollout (trial id).

output_docx.description: Path to the redlined .docx (the contract.docx edited in place).

author.description: Author string used in the tracked changes.

trace.description: Optional path to the agent trajectory/transcript.
